title: 3 Asset Managers Set to Continue Their Winning Streak in 2024
text: Despite the tough operating backdrop, KKR, Apollo Global (APO) and Victory Capital (VCTR) remain poised for AUM growth in 2024, supported by decent asset inflows.

title: Apollo-backed Aspen Insurance files IPO
text: Aspen Insurance Holdings, a specialty insurance and reinsurance company backed by Apollo Global Management Inc. APO, -3.26% filed for an initial public offering late Wednesday with underwriters Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC, Citigroup, Jefferies and Apollo Global Securities. The Bermuda-based company has yet to disclose its proposed trading symbol or stock exchange where it will list its common stock.

title: Farfetch in talks with Apollo Global Management about rescue deal: report
text: Farfetch Limited (NYSE:FTCH) is in talks with several parties including Apollo Global Management (NYSE:APO) about securing new financing, according to a report from Sky News. Sources told the media outlet that Apollo is one of several firms speaking with the company and that a deal was far from certain to be reached.

title: Private-equity firms build up record $2.59 trillion in ‘dry powder,' or capital on the sidelines
text: Capital waiting to be deployed, or so-called dry powder, rose 8% to a record $2.59 trillion in the past year, S&P said Tuesday.

title: Apollo Adds ELTIF to Wealth Product Platform Following CSSF Regulatory Approval
text: Apollo Clean Transition Equity ELTIF to provide European investors greater access to clean transition investments across private markets

title: Glancy Prongay & Murray LLP Announces Investigation of Apollo Global Management, Inc. (APO) (f/k/a Tango Holdings, Inc.)
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Glancy Prongay & Murray LLP (“GPM”) announces its investigation of Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE: APO) (f/k/a Tango Holdings, Inc.) concerning the Company and its directors' and officers' possible violations of state laws. If you own Apollo Global Management stock, would like to learn more about these claims, or have any questions concerning this announcement or your rights or interests with respect to these matters, please contact Tom Kennedy, of GPM, 230.
